title: Reading and Use of English – Part 3
description: For questions 17–24, read the text below. Use the word given in CAPITALS at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: Modern cities are (0) CONSTANTLY (CONSTANT) evolving to meet the needs of a growing population. One of the most (17) IMPRESSIVE (IMPRESS) trends is the shift towards sustainable architecture. This (18) MOVEMENT (MOVE) focuses on reducing the (19) ENVIRONMENTAL (ENVIRONMENT) impact of buildings through smart design. Architects are now (20) INCORPORATING (INCORPORATE) green roofs and solar panels into their plans. These (21) INNOVATIONS (INNOVATE) not only save energy but also improve the (22) LIVEABILITY (LIVE) of urban areas. Despite the (23) INITIAL (INITIATE) costs, the long-term benefits for the planet are (24) SIGNIFICANT (SIGNIFY). By prioritizing renewable resources and efficient waste management, the construction industry is helping to build a cleaner future. This holistic approach ensures that our urban centers remain functional and healthy for generations to come, proving that progress and nature can coexist harmoniously when we apply creativity and responsibility to the way we build our homes and workspaces.

example.explanation: Adverb required to modify the verb 'evolving'; CONSTANT → CONSTANTLY.

questions.explanation: Adjective required to modify 'trends'; IMPRESS → IMPRESSIVE.
Adjective required to modify 'impact'; ENVIRONMENT → ENVIRONMENTAL.
Present participle for continuous tense; INCORPORATE → INCORPORATING.
